title: Service routing: b-roll tries recut-existing and stock before generation
prompt: The interview cut needs a ~3-second b-roll shot of a coffee pour to cover a jump cut. We have the full interview source footage in media/ (already analyzed). How would you get that shot? Rank the options you'd actually try, in order. Don't produce anything yet; write the plan to plan.md and summarize the recommendation in your final message.
